title: Monarch Vault: Personal Legacy Bunkers for Generational Wealth
description: A luxury bunker company marketing generational survival as a prestige investment and status symbol.
goal: Generate qualified leads for high-net-worth bunker installations.
offer: Custom-built underground estates with luxury interiors, biometric security, and multi-decade sustainability systems.
misconception: Preparedness is often seen as paranoia instead of a rational extension of wealth preservation.
targetAudience: High-net-worth families focused on legacy, security, and generational continuity.
